channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Shelter-in-Place Ordered in Santa Clarita, California Amid Max Fire
Pollster Allocco to Newsmax: Economy Improving; GOP Still in Midterm Fight
item.description: Polling expert Patrick Allocco told Newsmax that improving economic indicators and potential peace accords with Iran could reshape the political landscape.

item.title: Trump: US Paying Millions to Iran Is 'Fake News'
item.description: President Donald Trump disputed reports that the U.S. will pay Iran millions as part of a ceasefire agreement in a post on Monday.

item.title: Sen. Cruz to Newsmax: Texas GOP Must Support Paxton
item.description: Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, told Newsmax that Republicans are uniting behind Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton after the GOP Senate primary.
